evaluation.summary: The artifact-free extraction reveals that the variance of primorial gap distributions scales sub‑quadratically with the mean gap, with the variance‑to‑mean² ratio rising from ~0.17 to ~0.33 as the primorial index increases from k=3 to k=7.
next_directions: Extend the analysis to higher primorials (k≥8) with rigorous statistical testing to assess convergence of the variance-to-mean² ratio.
Develop and validate a refined theoretical model that explains the observed sub‑quadratic scaling and its dependence on primorial structure.
Explore connections to related gap distributions in number theory and evaluate whether the trend generalizes across other sequences.
